description: I would highly recommend this software, specially with the development team available that can help modifying or adding any needed stuff by location, this means different laws and regulations, reports etc..
author: Ali Hisham S.
pros: System is easy to use, friendly vocabulary is used so even a non skilled employee will be able to work on it.. System availability is very high we rarely had major issues.. Integration with our business is on the go.. (Bayan w/Workday)
cons: Nothing from an Admin point of view, we always search for systems that make our IT life easy.. and this was done by Bayan

description: lately we didn't face any problem on the system, as the system always updated.

pros: very friendly system, and compatble with over system once we need to transfer data .
cons: as we use could bayan system, it is more ease to use it form home, and the system is very fast to use it remotly.

review_title: very nice software with good value for money
author: Vincent D.
pros: User friendly and easy to implement. Support always there to assist.
cons: Employee Self service could slightly better with added functionalities.

description: effective and helpful software for running the overall operation ,keeping history and tracking for employee and management data.
author: Hamada E.
pros: The software is effective one in terms of handling staff related issues that you can manage everything for your employee from one place ,their attendance , official documents, vacation , payrolls and many other features that facilitate the process for both the management and employee and help increase productivity and in the same time record the performance for subordinates.
cons: The System is easy to migrate to other software and for employee fingerprint and you can attain reports for easy tracking , also facilitate the communications process between all departments and specially human resource and finance .

author: Maher S.
pros: Cloud base payroll and time attendance, Secure and easy to use. Custom integration is a great value.
cons: None, All needs are met. specially when it comes to GCC requirements.

author: Muna B.
pros: Easy to use, the customer support team are helpful and supportive.
cons: There are other modules that are not functioning such as the training module.

review_title: Bayan - HR - Must application for Hotels
description: [SENSITIVE CONTENT HIDDEN] - Senior project Leader is so efficient and knowledgeable in this application. He is always ready to support us at any point of time remotely. Excellent Support. This is something all hotel take into serious consideration in going for Sky softwares.
author: Prajeeth J.
pros: It is simple, web-based and easy to navigate. You get all modules in one dashboard. Vast reporting features and customizable screen layouts. Integration with other apps like TA and mobile apps is extremely easy.
cons: Scouter monitor needs to be improved to a trendy and detailed list of employee punch in & out

description: I will say its one of the best software so far , highly recommended
author: Rachelle S.
pros: Very Good Software , All the information at your finger tips lol
cons: well nothing so far , Its a very good software , easy to generates reports ...

description: Very helpful and easy to use Also the support team is always ahed of everything and the changes

cons: Honestly this software no need any additional features as it covers all what we needs

author: Sahm D.
pros: So easy to use by the end users, and easy configuration. i like all the system features (HR, Payroll and attendance).
cons: Some time there is message error pop-up, we have to re-install it again.

review_title: Very good product VS other productes
description: Great Jordanian product VS other international products.

pros: Most of the features are impactful. The product is easy to use. The integration process was easy
cons: Some features can be improved and were discussed with the support team. Maybe over time is complicated to process and posting. No integration was great.

pros: the support and the quick response from support team

description: Totally satisfied with the support, administration and the product.
